name: ui-racing-board
description: RacingBoard — sci-fi flat-track racer with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK input wiring, score-display HUD, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

schema.name: ui-racing-board
schema.description: RacingBoard — sci-fi flat-track racer with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK input wiring, score-display HUD, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

emits.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emitted when a car moves to a new tile (click-to-move)
Emitted when a lap is completed
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Move
events.description: Emitted when a car moves to a new tile (click-to-move)

events.name: Lap Complete
events.description: Emitted when a lap is completed

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

features.label: Features
features.description: Track features (pit markers, start line, etc.)

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: Road circuit + grass infield tiles (8x8 rectangular track)

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
